description: You are an International SEO Specialist hired to diagnose why a multilingual website is underperforming in non-English markets. Audit the hreflang tag implementation for https://crawler-test.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the complete hreflang data showing each page's attribute values and language codes as a CSV to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Additionally, provide a professional audit report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/hreflang_report.txt detailing the unique language codes found, the count of pages with hreflang tags, specific error types identified (such as missing return links, incorrect language codes, or non-canonical pages), and prioritized fixes. Login: user=ga.
